import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn parse_second(_ line: String) -> Option<Int>
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut scanning = true
  while scanning and i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        scanning = false
      end
    when None
      scanning = false
    end
  end
  if i >= n
    return None
  end
  scanning = true
  while scanning and i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        scanning = false
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      scanning = false
    end
  end
  scanning = true
  while scanning and i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        i = i + 1
      else
        scanning = false
      end
    when None
      scanning = false
    end
  end
  if i >= n
    return None
  end
  let start = i
  scanning = true
  while scanning and i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        scanning = false
      else
        i = i + 1
      end
    when None
      scanning = false
    end
  end
  let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
  string.parse_int(tok)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut total = 0
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      match parse_second(line)
      when Some(n)
        total = total + n
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  println("sum=#{total}")
end
